item.title: Can I Conquer This Monster Meal?
item.description: A fun food challenge centered on a huge meal and the question of whether it can be conquered.

item.title: Me vs This Giant Bucket of Chicken
item.description: A fun food challenge featuring a giant bucket of chicken, plenty of flavor, and a lighthearted competitive eating vibe.

media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge featuring a giant bucket of chicken, plenty of flavor, and a lighthearted competitive eating vibe.

item.title: 10 Minutes for a Large Pizza Challenge
item.description: A fun pizza challenge with a large pie and a 10-minute timer. Lighthearted, fast-paced, and all about enjoying a big slice of the action.

media:content.media:title: 10 Minutes for a Large Pizza Challenge
media:content.media:description: A fun pizza challenge with a large pie and a 10-minute timer. Lighthearted, fast-paced, and all about enjoying a big slice of the action.

item.title: This Food Challenge Is Harder Than It Looks
item.description: A fun food challenge that looks simple at first, but brings plenty of flavor and a real test of appetite.

media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge that looks simple at first, but brings plenty of flavor and a real test of appetite.

item.title: $1000 Godzadilla!
item.description: A fun $1000 Godzadilla challenge with a big, bold food presentation and plenty of competitive energy.

item.title: Bob and I Took on the 6 Foot Burrito
item.description: Bob and I take on a 6 foot burrito challenge with a $2000 prize on the line.

item.title: This Burger Nearly Took Me Down!
item.description: A huge burger challenge with big flavor and a fun, lighthearted finish.
